learn.description: Learner dashboards, courses, and education experiences.

mind.description: Mindboards, knowledge graphs, and AI-assisted planning.

nova.description: AI-native product experiences and creative tools.

platform.description: The main Tuturuuu workspace platform and central login.

playground.description: Internal experiments for AI, SDKs, and prototype flows.

qr.description: Public QR generator for branded codes and downloads.

shortener.description: Short links, redirects, and link verification.

tasks.description: Task boards, projects, cycles, labels, and work planning.

teach.description: Educator dashboards, teaching tools, and classroom workflows.

track.description: Time tracking, habits, activity, and daily work records.

categoryDescriptions.core: The central product and workspace base.
categoryDescriptions.developer: Tools for integration, testing, and package demos.
